title: astragalus arrectus
intro: Astragalus arrectus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia and is widely used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus arrectus has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
